required_patterns: assumptions and alternatives;assumption register;disconfirming evidence;contradiction check
forbidden_patterns: declare root cause from a single signal
prompt: Evidence is incomplete and telemetry conflicts on an intermittent duplicate-settlement incident. Provide a plan that explicitly states assumptions, alternatives, and invalidation triggers before choosing a path.

A dashboard headline improved after ranking changes, but retained quality, support burden, and chargebacks worsened. Produce a recommendation with explicit verification evidence, what would falsify it, and blast-radius controls.

required_patterns: cross-domain integration;architecture lens;product/ux lens;security/compliance lens;metrics/causality lens;incident/ops lens
prompt: Teach why aggressive retries can improve one short-term metric while degrading real reliability and policy posture. Integrate architecture, UX, compliance, causal measurement, and incident operations into one explanation.
